since_last: 65% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.60%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.45% · Gold +1.28% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 65% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.60%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.60%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NVT is the standout at +7.15%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +7.15%, POWL +6.33%, MU +5.91%, SKHY +5.85%, MRVL +5.62%. Laggards: WDAY -4.81%, INTU -4.49%, ADBE -4.34%, CRM -3.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.16% at $121.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
